svg.text: Send metrics, logs, and traces from Claude Code to Elastic Cloud using
built-in OpenTelemetry. No collector or sidecar needed — direct OTLP export.

g.text: • Set all three exporters to otlp
• Auth via API key in headers
for Bash cmds, MCP info, and file paths.
Subagent spans nest under parent tools.
Bash inherits TRACEPARENT for distributed tracing.
→ Add custom labels to all signals
